_comment: Remaining Phase-1 seed members for the LM Studio runner. Ordered easiest-first (copy the `mirror` member's structure). The runner skips any whose .ts already exists, so it is resumable.

members.summary: Notion connector: pure buildRequest + parseResponse over requesturl-fetch; Bearer token auth from caller.
Google connector: pure request builder + response parser over requesturl-fetch; OAuth bearer token from caller.
Microsoft 365 connector: pure request builder + parser over requesturl-fetch; OAuth bearer from caller.
Twilio connector: pure request builder (Basic auth) + parser over requesturl-fetch.
Headless setting-row builder; label + control container styled only via cssTokens (zero literals).
Headless touch-timeline: ordered list of touch rows styled only via cssTokens (zero literals).
Headless inbox list builder: rows of pending items styled only via cssTokens (zero literals).
Pure buildSummarizeRequest + parseSummary over requesturl-fetch (LLM endpoint); returns a summary string.
Compose connectors/websearch to research a person; returns { name, sources: SearchResult[] }.
Compose connectors/websearch to research an org; returns { org, sources: SearchResult[] }.

applyTouch(vault,file,{tick,channel}): atomically merge last_touch/touch_count/last_channel into frontmatter via vault-process-note + frontmatter-merge + parse-yaml; idempotent when tick <= existing last_touch.
routeIntro(cache,file,subject): use skills/infer-edges then score edges by type (worked_with=2, knows=1), return edges sorted by score desc then to asc (stable).
registerScheduleTouch(plugin,run) command; scheduleTouch(vault,file,tick) sets next_touch frontmatter via vault-process-note + frontmatter-merge.
registerEmbeddingSync(plugin,run) command bound to running chainers/embedding-pipeline.
registerOpenInbox(plugin,run) command to reveal the inbox view.
Talent bundling intro-routing; analyzeOutreach delegates to chainers/intro-routing.
